fuses.description: [V8 engine]: Ignition coils. [Diesel]: High pressure control valve, high pressure pump

[V6 engine]: Fuel tank vent valve, electropneumatic converter, crankcase heating, bypass valve, secondary air pump relay, sound symposer. [Hybrid]: Low temperature coolant pump

[Turbo, Turbo S]: Fuel system diagnostic pump, secondary air pump relay, electronic exhaust valve. hall sensor, oil level sensor. [Cayenne]: Fuel system diagnostic pump, air flow meter. [S. GTS]: Diagnostic fuel system pump. electronic exhaust valve. [All]: Radiator fan control unit, brake light switch. radiator louvers
[Turbo, Turbo S]: Valve timing controllers, thermostat for electronic engine cooling control, valve lift controller

[Cayenne]: Engine crankcase ventilation system heating resistor, oil level and temperature sensor. [S, GTS]: Valve timing controllers. thermostat for electronic engine cooling system control, valve lift controller. [Hybrid]: Oil level and temperature sensor
[V6 engine]: Coolant circulation pump, Air intake switch valve, Coolant control valve, Cam timing control valve, Intake flap valve.
[V6 engine]: Fuel pressure regulator, timing control valve, exhaust valve timing control valve
[Hybrid]: Fuel pressure regulator, Hybrid drive ACB refrigerant shutoff valve, secondary air control valve, oil pressure control valve, adsorber solenoid valve
[Diesel]: Selective catalytic reduction (SCR), fuel tank electronics
[Cayenne S. GTS]: Camshaft sensor. oil level sensor
[Cayenne. S E-Hybrid, Turbo, Turbo S]: Lambda probe heating element #1 and #2. [Diesel]: Nitrogen oxide sensor after neutralizer, Nitrogen oxide sensor, Particle sensor, Lambda probe heating element
[S, GTS]: Lambda probe heating element #1 and #2
